eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 10:04 AM on OCT 4, 2019 Effective until 11:04 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the State of Nevada Emergency Alert System from the Nevada Department of Public Safety. Broadcasters, cable operators, I-P-T-V providers and the National Weather Service provide E-A-S to public safety officials as a way for state and local officials to warn you about emergencies and keep you informed during disasters. This station provides this service free of charge as part of our commitment to serve this community. You can find information about preparing for emergencies on state and local government websites. Stay informed and stay safe by listening to your favorite local radio station and watching your favorite local TV station. This concludes today's test of the Emergency Alert System.
